name: phase02_config_editor
outcome_goal: Gear icon on each module opens a config editor overlay

jobs.label: p2_config_editor_panel
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/grid/ConfigEditorPanel.tsx:

A slide-out panel that appears when clicking a gear icon on a module. It lets users edit the module's config.

Props: { quadrantId: string, moduleId: string, config: Record<string, unknown>, onSave: (newConfig: Record<string, unknown>) => void, onClose: () => void }

For known config keys, render appropriate inputs:
- endpoint (text input)
- objectType (text input)
- title (text input)
- placeholder (text input)
- publishSelection (text input — objectType name)
- subscribeSelection (text input — objectType name)
- columns (JSON array editor — show each column as a row with key/label/sortable inputs)
- chartType / type (dropdown: bar, line, pie)
- refreshInterval (number input)
- actions (JSON array — show each action as label + variant dropdown)

For any key not in the known list, show a raw JSON textarea.

Styling:
- Position: absolute, right side of the quadrant cell, z-index 100
- Dark theme: bg var(--bg-card), border var(--border), radius var(--radius)
- Width: 320px, max-height 80vh, overflow-y auto
- Header with module name + close X button
- Save button at bottom (accent color)

Also create src/grid/ConfigEditorPanel.css for styles.

Write both files.

jobs.label: p2_gear_icon_and_overlay
